CREATE TABLE geometries (id int, geo geometry);
INSERT INTO geometries (id, geo) VALUES (1, bif:st_point(0, 52));
INSERT INTO geometries (id, geo) VALUES (2, bif:st_polygon('POLYGON((0 51, 1 51, 1 53, 0 53, 0 51))'));
INSERT INTO geometries (id, geo) VALUES (3, bif:st_polygon('POLYGON((0.5 51.5, 1.5 51.5, 1.5 52.5, 0.5 52.5, 0.5 51.5))'));
SELECT ?c ?geo WHERE { ?m geo:geometry ?geo . ?m a ?c . FILTER (bif:st_within(?geo, bif:st_point(0, 52), 0)) } LIMIT 10;
SELECT ?c ?geo WHERE { ?m geo:geometry ?geo . ?m a ?c . FILTER (bif:st_within(?geo, bif:st_polygon('POLYGON((0 51, 1 51, 1 53, 0 53, 0 51))'), 0)) } LIMIT 10;
SELECT ?c ?geo WHERE { ?m geo:geometry ?geo . ?m a ?c . FILTER (bif:st_within(?geo, bif:st_polygon('POLYGON((0 51, 1 51, 1 53, 0 53, 0 51))'), 0.5)) } LIMIT 10;
SELECT ?c ?geo WHERE { ?m geo:geometry ?geo . ?m a ?c . FILTER (bif:st_within(?geo, bif:st_polygon('POLYGON((0.5 51.5, 1.5 51.5, 1.5 52.5, 0.5 52.5, 0.5 51.5))'), 0)) } LIMIT 10;
SELECT ?c ?geo WHERE { ?m geo:geometry ?geo . ?m a ?c . FILTER (bif:st_within(?geo, bif:st_point(0.5, 52), 0.1)) } LIMIT 10;
SELECT ?c ?geo WHERE { SELECT ?m ?geo WHERE { ?m geo:geometry ?geo . ?m a ?c . FILTER (bif:st_within(?geo, bif:st_point(0, 52), 100)) } } LIMIT 10;
